name: EVA Precision Industrial Holdings Limited
summary: EVA Precision Industrial Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the provision of precision manufacturing services in the People's Republic of China, Hong Kong, Vietnam, and Mexico. It operates through two segments, Office Automation Equipment and Automotive Component. The company engages in the design and fabrication of precision metal and plastic moulds; and manufacture of precision metal and plastic components. It is also involved in the lathing of metal components; and assembly of precision metal and plastic components into semi-finished products. In addition, the company trades in moulds and components; and develops properties. It serves the office automation equipment, automobile, high technology, and consumer electronic industries. EVA Precision Industrial Holdings Limited was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Kowloon, Hong Kong.
